name: onboarding-windows-app
description: Welcome to your first task as a Focus Bear intern! This repository is designed to guide you through your onboarding process by providing **structured learning materials** and **practical tasks**. You’ll start by setting up your own project repository, which will serve as a workspace for your internship. This will help you become comfortable with GitHub workflows, automation, and best practices.

scripts.check:docs: npm run lint:markdown -- "**/*.md" "#node_modules" && npm run spellcheck -- "**/*.md"
